category_sources: Official README at https://github.com/esnet/iperf describes iperf3 as a network bandwidth measurement tool.
source_facts.description says iperf3 measures TCP, UDP, and SCTP bandwidth.
display_name_sources: Official project documentation at https://software.es.net/iperf/ and repository at https://github.com/esnet/iperf use the name iperf3.
docs_sources: Official README at https://github.com/esnet/iperf points users to https://software.es.net/iperf/ for more information and to the manual page as the command reference.
https://software.es.net/iperf/ is the dedicated official documentation site.
repo_sources: Official README at https://github.com/esnet/iperf states that source code and issue tracking are at https://github.com/esnet/iperf.
source_facts.repo is empty, and source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL.
tags_sources: Official README at https://github.com/esnet/iperf describes throughput, bitrate, loss, and network performance testing.
source_facts.description identifies TCP, UDP, and SCTP bandwidth measurement.
